rationale: Materialise both `seq@` ensures as concrete Seq equalities through the shared `update(...)` RHS, lift via `=~=` extensionality to `==`, and propagate to the `Ghost<Seq<A>>` field; combined with the trivial `r1 == r2` (unit) this gives z3 the explicit per-field equalities backing `det_set_equal`.
